member.name: M:FiberHelp.Models.Client.GenerateClientId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a user-friendly Client ID like CLT-0001

member.name: T:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback
member.summary: Represents client feedback after a service/transaction is completed. Clients can rate their experience and provide comments.

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.TransactionProofId
member.summary: Related transaction proof ID

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.TicketId
member.summary: Related ticket ID (if feedback is for a ticket resolution)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.InvoiceId
member.summary: Related invoice ID (if feedback is for a payment)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ClientId
member.summary: Client who provided the feedback

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ClientName
member.summary: Client name for display

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.Rating
member.summary: Overall rating (1-5 stars)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ServiceQualityRating
member.summary: Service quality rating (1-5)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ResponseTimeRating
member.summary: Response time rating (1-5)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ProfessionalismRating
member.summary: Staff professionalism rating (1-5)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.CommunicationRating
member.summary: Communication rating (1-5)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.WouldRecommend
member.summary: Would the client recommend the service? (NPS question)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.Comments
member.summary: Client's comments/feedback text

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.FeedbackCategory
member.summary: Category of feedback: ServiceQuality, Billing, Technical, General

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.HandledById
member.summary: ID of technician/agent who handled the service (for performance tracking)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.HandledByName
member.summary: Name of technician/agent

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.SubmittedAt
member.summary: When the feedback was submitted

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.IsReviewed
member.summary: Whether the feedback has been reviewed by management

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ReviewedAt
member.summary: When the feedback was reviewed

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ReviewedById
member.summary: Who reviewed the feedback

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.ReviewNotes
member.summary: Internal notes from the review

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.Status
member.summary: Status: Pending, Reviewed, ActionRequired, Resolved

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.RequiresFollowUp
member.summary: Whether follow-up is required

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.FollowUpNotes
member.summary: Follow-up notes if required

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.FollowUpCompletedAt
member.summary: When follow-up was completed

member.name: M:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.GetAverageRating
member.summary: Calculate average rating across all rating categories

member.name: M:FiberHelp.Models.ClientFeedback.GetRatingLabel
member.summary: Get a human-readable rating label

member.name: T:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof
member.summary: Represents proof of a completed transaction/service in the CRM system. Generated when a ticket is resolved or an invoice is paid.

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.ReferenceNumber
member.summary: Unique reference number for the transaction proof (e.g., TXN-2025-000001)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.TransactionType
member.summary: Type of transaction: TicketResolution, PaymentConfirmation, ServiceCompletion

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.TicketId
member.summary: Related ticket ID (if applicable)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.InvoiceId
member.summary: Related invoice ID (if applicable)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.ClientId
member.summary: Client ID who received the service

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.ClientName
member.summary: Client name for display purposes

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.AccountId
member.summary: Account ID (if applicable)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.Description
member.summary: Description of what was completed

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.Amount
member.summary: Amount involved (for payment transactions)

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.CompletedById
member.summary: ID of the agent/technician who completed the transaction

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.CompletedByName
member.summary: Name of the agent/technician who completed the transaction

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.CompletedAt
member.summary: When the transaction was completed

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the proof record was created

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.Status
member.summary: Status of the proof: Generated, Sent, Acknowledged

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.AcknowledgedAt
member.summary: When the client acknowledged/viewed the proof

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.Notes
member.summary: Resolution notes or additional details

member.name: P:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.VerificationCode
member.summary: Digital signature or verification hash

member.name: M:FiberHelp.Models.TransactionProof.GenerateReferenceNumber(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a unique reference number for the transaction

member.name: M:FiberHelp.Services.AdminService.ResolveTicketWithProofAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolve a ticket and automatically generate transaction proof for the client. This creates a verified proof of service completion.

member.summary: Check if feedback exists for a ticket

member.summary: Get transaction proof for a ticket

member.summary: Generate a verification code for transaction proof

member.summary: Automatically marks pending invoices as Overdue if past due date

member.summary: Get all clients (customers) for invoice dropdown

member.summary: Generate monthly subscription invoices for all active clients

member.summary: Create a service invoice linked to a resolved ticket

member.summary: Get invoices for a specific client

member.name: M:FiberHelp.Services.BillingService.GetUnpaidInvoicesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get unpaid invoices for a client

member.name: M:FiberHelp.Services.BillingService.GetPlanAmount(System.String)
member.summary: Get plan amount based on plan name

member.name: M:FiberHelp.Services.BillingService.GetClientBillingSummaryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get client billing summary

member.name: T:FiberHelp.Services.ErrorHandlingService
member.summary: Centralized error handling service with user-friendly messages

member.summary: Get user-friendly error message from exception

member.summary: Get user-friendly message for specific operation context

member.summary: Check if error is critical (requires immediate attention)

member.summary: Log error to history

member.summary: Get recent error history

member.summary: Clear error history

member.summary: Error log entry

member.name: T:FiberHelp.Services.TransactionService
member.summary: Service for handling transaction validation, proof generation, and client feedback.

member.summary: Generate proof of transaction when a ticket is resolved

member.summary: Get transaction proof by reference number

member.summary: Validate a transaction proof using verification code

member.summary: Mark proof as acknowledged by client

member.summary: Get all transaction proofs with optional filtering

member.summary: Submit client feedback for a transaction

member.summary: Get all feedback from a client

member.summary: Get all feedback (for admin review)

member.summary: Mark feedback as reviewed

member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
